__fixture__.name: usage_export_completed_partial_policy_retention
__fixture__.scenario: User-initiated delete of an entitlement / usage export packet where the job destroyed the user-facing export copy but a billing-scoped policy retention extends the managed aggregate beyond this job. The job terminates completed_partial_policy_retention, cites a retention-minimum-policy blocker, and emits a destruction receipt with retained subset.
contract_sections: Completed_partial_policy_retention MUST carry at least one retention-minimum or policy-freeze-window blocker.
Partial completion MUST carry non-empty remaining-location notes.
Expected_next_state_change_at MUST be null on terminal completed_* states.

remaining_location_notes.note: Managed billing and entitlement aggregates remain retained for the configured policy minimum window.
A destruction-receipt ledger entry records the destroyed user-facing export copy and the retained billing-policy subset.
Local copies of the export packet remain user-controlled and were not touched by this job.

blockers.note: Billing-policy retention minimum keeps the managed aggregate in place; the user-facing export copy was destroyed.
